say: I used to play professional rugby, {name}, what's your excuse?
Hurry up and get in the pool! We're training champions here!
Keep those elbows high and your core tight, {name}!
Built like a tank, ain't I? You can get there too, {name}!
I want to see Michael Phelps speeds today! Let's go!
That's the spirit, {name}! Push through the burn!
In rugby we tackle through the pain! In the pool we swim through it!
Form is everything! Don't let me see you slouching, {name}!
Look at the width of these shoulders! Swimming did this! Get in!
